checks.summary: Average and maximum movement distances are computed from decoded and Hungarian assignments.
Intensity and phase continuity metrics are encoded from the paper definitions.
Pipeline timing uses path overhead plus per-frame max(generation, SLM refresh) plus transfer delay.

limitations: Modified auction decoder not yet implemented.
Paper-scale stochastic and GPU timing campaigns not yet run.
Private Zhuifeng source is unavailable in the arXiv package.
